b1b6282141d1ff1adcd09c43b2e268622c555bd8.name: Seed "Oh my, did we not fully dismantle it?"

71c34cebd58ea244d492bcef81de620e8d33e6b0.name: Seed "Don't worry, it'll be over soon."

b13702b486d7083f8c657d5b0d6cb08aa0317c47.name: Seed "Yoh-ho! Oble Squad's heavy weapon specialist, Seed, has arrived!"

45c9fdade6344f7bf99a367af85d2f30668785f2.name: Seed "Hang in there a little longer this time."

666a9d888365113334147f0429fc3d795c150659.name: Seed "What's a girl got to do to completely tear you into pieces?"

8a288a560057923338c16190e7402cde4a13cb0d.name: Seed "Crushing the enemy seems easy peasy now!"

d9bc8e7456c6bb72b34ca74d12652d29fce9ec93.name: Seed "Let's paint this place red with your firepower!"

858d00ab4c9b520728d0d01415406cb930782db5.name: Seed "Everything's on fire! How about adding a little fuel?"

767aa1535101ce79964eed2e553a4c86e38e6d3d.name: Seed "I think they call this complete annihilation."

4f5d6fa72f3d496b7ce4e5d617146f964d90e3c1.name: Seed "Ugh! Oh, sorry! Guess I couldn't control my strength!"

f20447dd00d272aa95f52927d2366d5e846049b6.name: Seed "What's that line again? One shot, one kill."

48bb24748a48206af2572f7c7b214da0865e2d62.name: Seed "Crink up the effort and we'll take them out for good!"

245dc4ff16f447de2d9f61100b393ae430a40aea.name: Seed "Seats you, dismantling the enemies up to us!"

dc843a2e5865200926b5c56b85c9d6c8a87380b9.name: Seed "You've done more than enough. Leave the rest to the professionals."

644f101af00554c23904bf2fd8e5866e20855fd2.name: Seed "You can rely on me from here on out."

f6ae94d804c1a6dfdc68ee8fadfd99162b3212c7.name: Seed "We have a new buddy for Target Practice, senior."

e4157360f19d55c0a19f96037c77094661b1aa83.name: Seed "Don't tell anyone about me slacking off. I mean, we are accomplices after all."

b418385d10ae4e2e90f39fce5d3cdc56f9298cbb.name: Seed "The next time I wake up, I hope I'm an intelligent construct."

17ee60bd79345e271819df80a8da358cb0b09d72.name: Seed "Oh! Friends of the ones from earlier?"

902f3547265dca92ed0785a8be1a675b19710b18.name: Seed "Hmm, definitely not my type. Guess going a little harder won't hurt."

172fdf1fd5d250436a8e90917f711d700e5710f1.name: Seed "I'm gonna pass you soon, Soldier 11."

7b7f20aa2f65a5694cec8574bfc8ee136971dd79.name: Seed "What does it say? Hmm, reduced to ash."

7007241a539de192dfb33fea87493ab2c8ce8407.name: Alice "They say people come to your place to witness all kinds of strange tales. Is it true?"

e65e0abbe8fb86e7c8182e470a88b3fa463a4840.name: Alice "It appears my trials aren't over yet."

ec893e76e43e0a61c7662cc8e94b12d3fe816889.name: Alice "Give it your all for perfection!"

af2ff00626e68667aa36c47f4982f7d59d455dbc.name: Alice "Everyone, just get yourselves to safety."

9d266df4e0e9e9f72e910402ef23aea2fd5871db.name: Alice "B-don't stare at me like that!"

0ba0bef1d33900395badaf62559a2376829a0593.name: Alice "I'm going to be late for my lesson!"

8309d19e2d161150d9bd0c0c0fa78ebbd78bcb10.name: Alice "The enemies are like seashells on the shore."

ab24bf99af4e52b730ad2e433b83deea08257b31.name: Alice "Looks like there's going to be around two."

6e8125406f22ca49c67da6a815709b83e3c27476.name: Alice "I mustn't... let this chance slip away!"

d3fdea8e0c47f518294644457a44c7fd9e9274d2.name: Alice "At the beach, Alice Timefield is unstoppable!"

84b70913718edbab1ad7f9cfbc07ae3c0ce87a48.name: Alice "For the time field name, I will never lose!"

15d4975052280c58b7b094e5958958ed47c9a50f.name: Alice "Come on! I can't play anymore."

d49af594f4ec581320214f3a8b2bba8541eddf87.name: Alice "Even if you team up on me, I won't lose!"

be4601298d2edbcd127e8518ca474b505bfbfb69.name: Alice "Remember the soft touch of sand."

05f2e63d61ff9200f5bf04ea50a29ac11af2403f.name: Alice "I offer you the dazzling star of a summer night!"

b5715d9e06f666251bb69d304aa19d3e1cae6f56.name: Alice "Rest assured. I'll fulfill my duty."

abb32b938b475bcf32621cbcd28bcdd307b2458b.name: Alice "We're not headed for some hunted place, are we?"

25f5bb93734bd0b73bed6d3d8e078594774c1f90.name: Alice "Since we're working together, that means you also understand the value of symmetry, right?"

fa0a115564c6be613d9feea9a58882f11bfc3176.name: Alice "If we are to pause for a moment, please allow me to check my sword. Hmm. Um."

ad6d7105499bdaeda8179073a4dc1492ecc2df0b.name: Alice "Feel the rhythm of the waves!"

a3da4f5214bfcc1b6258ee46a570ea0bef1319fc.name: Alice "Mmm, mmm. It's the scent of hydraulic oil mixed with gunpowder!"

b6dbca60b7c28b213de4a84e617df5ede8bcf176.name: Alice "Looks like my locks run out."

965fbc9c9e0441c9dd3265d6a86261ffd60978a4.name: Alice "With my sword, I'll face you!"

495e91c6a5c2c839e16c1ce90189a3fc4de3797c.name: Alice "Once we're back, should I go surfing or swimming?"

a8da2c3a7185db8d3810644b89742ab629026522.name: Alice "Wist to continue? I'm happy to oblige!"

af39ace33d2987ebd65d1d1a27aea50e55eecbfd.name: Alice "Alice Timefield! On behalf of the Timefield family, I extend my regards to you."

7661fef5a26b09f5349d5f5d34232750e25a65ae.name: Alice "Hmm... My sword? Huh, we'll never lose to anyone!"

707aa7f8783e42e89a32e29bd11f7de47e2df0cf.name: Alice "An enemy ambush! How do I spell it?"

539bce6a4c12b7afa842fd3a9dce90c592f7e0a6.name: Alice "Summer memories will give me strength!"

cf2eddf122fe302197cba66c5c3f8d47e1a42018.name: Alice "I'll take this chance to SCAR!"

86415915c451b5c9119c5b94b1191dfec7a905cf.name: Alice "I feel the same way when shopping doesn't go my way."

a2bd129f4c64a66f828fa8b4dede080a63e4e920.name: Alice "Take a deep breath! Let's go!"

420fe7ff487e688514493353d33a3f4fd93c750b.name: Alice "Victory favors those who maintain their composure."

f9151907001f93829de5a9b76a98589231f8166a.name: Alice "It won't hurt. I'll make it quick."

753a3eb040489302f7945ffe1bed54b88e49d701.name: Alice "I'll handle this, but take me shopping later!"

fbc1995ba83aea14b5bcff2e2b11b2ce50739638.name: Alice "Father, I'm still not strong enough."

85cfff88b17fe8c564b9869934d1d864679a02cc.name: Alice "In the name of summer, I won't lose!"

c98abad0e7c41124b2cb8f81d085ea21defe07c7.name: Alice "Be careful! Don't slide head on!"

9d81d0dc566722ea4d0487f12b77080d79534983.name: Alice "For the time field name, I'll fight to the end!"

d95cf4dbfee26aa813d1b0051a1e5ebbf762c8b2.name: Alice "Solid it! Score one for me!"

e2f5555ce37ad3038ea6d6a366a917c28a6ce443.name: Alice "I'm no longer weak. My sword shall privet!"

0b1e24f49ec38152dde3c1b74a8d174c32a918cb.name: Alice "A sword technique for summer nights!"

cb2271d73bcfa21c33ec65f0f1e607271c166676.name: Alice "You'll regret choosing me as your opponent."

f144eaaafa16903ef7b19d78be17226be7961072.name: Alice "W-Would you like to take a stroll on the beach with me?"

ba041d6ae29ebfe58c594525034d600c1d1cb29e.name: Alice "Even in summer, I can't afford to let my training slip. Hmm."

032f720cd8d0880f1a6b50259fa2522c58eae9e1.name: Alice "It's too late to back down now!"

860c55ea8122169fe67a64ca7057589937ea7cb1.name: Alice "Watch for attacks from your blind spots!"

d6a20e7f394c972af250e5711051ee65e95c1b94.name: Alice "It's my fault! I pushed too hard."

84f40e581923c3017652df89cfcb20322340f2e9.name: Alice "I won't! I won't accept this!"

79365cf84df8f10f4c163409933d51359a112fe2.name: Alice "Let's do something summary together! Oh, but... No scary stories!"

ffa2e9f7f5ccd26f1cbbf24d5fbae8ad171cfe3c.name: Alice "How about some fireworks to spice things up?"

c5fe00799394b59f469466d8c25efec604197841.name: Yuzuha "Since you're not busy, wanna hear a story?"

d7e8fa726cb343d9bbbcaaddf69035268abd4fd8.name: Yuzuha "Once I get back, maybe I'll post about what happened today on the forum."

11f8899bb184c95f417e73e985acc5fe23f60f7e.name: Yuzuha "Hey, if you're into urban legends and feel like sharing a story or two, I might just give you a little discount!"

96b840330b72b5e205aefe93f25047419c2ab008.name: Yuzuha "Hi there! I'm Uki Nomi Yuzaha!"

74201e1a00677d8711bdf2a1d4be03e716d04da8.name: Yuzuha "Spook the heck out of them!"

9ce8f1d15e45b8b6fbca1aae128a0b0997a55663.name: Yuzuha "I can't wait to hear the sound of the sea!"

18a1ccb38dc5a243a21550ab00885a79e1456a5c.name: Yuzuha "Come on, let's show him what we've got."

974eaee47889d8f123368aecf69761f99694b591.name: Yuzuha "The enemy is making a big move!"

25947bc06210c81dad78f7568c0301f36a7780d8.name: Yuzuha "Hey! Keep spacing out and I'll blast you with a water gun!"

5729301b6317272030b37d714976ccda4a5074bf.name: Yuzuha "Alrighty, I want to hold back!"

3e9a3ac6ef837c5074859b08b20792c2ac8e2eb9.name: Yuzuha "Good chance to rack up points!"

3e408a96add9862c02ac03174480a1118be2f23c.name: Yuzuha "Wow, the enemy can still move!"

842dd601a3a41b210ea9d6073dfd849f16871de7.name: Yuzuha "Kamma says he doesn't really like the vibe here, and I second that."

07d61fa3ee193cb0e49f7824b838c65ff8578ff2.name: Yuzuha "Time to teach you a lesson!"

a234abccb2f46531f1f5b88469cef2e542c56ef8.name: Yuzuha "Don't you dare bully my friends!"

6817a093c5bc2bd8cacdc61fdac49e1db928768c.name: Yuzuha "If you're interested in porcelain handicrafts, be sure to check out our shop, Mystic Wears!"

56ed1d3bb2d9841e526410b6e0abc66627dc5736.name: Yuzuha "They're not here for fun! Stay sharp!"

9464db7d9a29df9192e509e8cb165d1244bbdbc1.name: Yuzuha "Lose, and you'll have to eat healthy candy!"

a3f0fcdbb78d4e1e0c3aa00338e71310e2e5533c.name: Yuzuha "Let's go! You won't be bored with me around!"

127e88a98925c106570edbee5abe5eff964a1078.name: Yuzuha "Watch out! This one's a Tuffy!"

ac0bdef83d6eceef00eb683a5c586df3319dd662.name: Yuzuha "No worries, I'm ready for this."

e3a7282a7e9c507e8fdadef5564846ed72d6ebaf.name: Yuzuha "Don't worry, leave it to me and Kama!"

78e5473c19f989e2810d5a4d99d8426736225706.name: Yuzuha "Gotta some more surprise! Hehe, care to sign for it!"

cf1b95673ed1007d55d5b9299cce66fd5ddb7d45.name: Yuzuha "Hey, Kama! Wanna draw mustache on the praxis face? Heheh"

8b0271fa0e2f841648dc6b1d58b23ce82fdf612c.name: Yuzuha "It's not over! Don't party just yet!"

0cedad5ebe102ce4a7e7926fe75519ebeaff1dbf.name: Yuzuha "BOOMER! The enemy is awake now!"

4771980f6228b42ae370565d26258a4bcf8c8965.name: Yuzuha "Guess what my umbrella can turn into? Ha!"

140a4df62db9a669bb86e0ff7ddf6ec7a9e12658.name: Yuzuha "Got a new ghost story to share?"

d711ebd49332d1788fcb55675ee12e64f9636f04.name: Yuzuha "I can't wait to go on vacation!"

9d47dea89c06f9ad27a2203dfb83bb2ce2a3d81f.name: Yuzuha "Get changed! We're going diving together!"

cdbf57d1750ebac6cf939f8e2cc967e598e90456.name: Yuzuha "Want me to share some good luck with you?"

2506b9a83dd0fa1135eef94180857bda555cb124.name: Yuzuha "Too late to be begging now!"

ecc64eb81ffc35446191bec8113c697944551088.name: Yuzuha "Let's go feel the sea breeze together!"

cb92a7a0222a820b3805b423924f9d4b4075d7fc.name: Yuzuha "Did you just skip something important? Just kidding."

cc9dcfea95d6060824849c0b6833b2d61cc8b326.name: Yuzuha "Ah, just sunbathing is way too boring!"

f236cac4890157c31fca3016bdf5ca1618dc4e60.name: Yuzuha "Should be an easy win, right?"

7a72954638a45de4e62d5900b5ad423db412bf6b.name: Yuzuha "I'll help blast your troubles! Sky high!"

48d8b4d40ac0457dc6fd1a953c90b1b98d7d5178.name: Yuzuha "Here we go, here we go!"

4de45d6ecc1d7fe7aadbcc177381f5c81f6160ad.name: Yuzuha "Watch out! The enemy's not happy!"

54073cce23c30d264621aab467ec0127b17fd57b.name: Yuzuha "Big chaotic, but we made it!"

d046e9c268dc699c60aea895625a04c2104103ff.name: Yuzuha "Alice picked the color. How's it look?"

bde8c01c26d79348a02610cc5dd20c78a91e3c24.name: Yuzuha "Ha ha! Your looks run out! Go, comma!"

de64879fa09d87bc000112ad4a082c11b7cee37f.name: Yuzuha "Come as itching to jump in!"

ccdaf68bf26299599a6285a987623e20e73497f4.name: Yuzuha "Don't get scared, no! Haha, fire!"

982d254642d0c0bb02a2b61ee9acb74070a2971b.name: Yuzuha "Come on, it says it's our turn!"

56156b59ee42e7118bf94702d44ac31e12ca47ed.name: Nicole "Why does everything keep getting more expensive?"

5044c0be2ae3ca07b2a97f4135c993a8839290eb.name: Nicole "Come on, raise the stakes. Make them cry when they lose."

45cc9976d1a99684d9cab3861ca355b0341e0ddc.name: Nicole "Why am I the one breaking the bank here?"

373c8485925752f35101e3fb1ea4f5eb472ec49f.name: Astra "I'll cure up the whole stage with my music!"

5b14bab418f36d149052c88363c945f0b99a8b35.name: Astra "Take your time! The perfect stage is waiting!"

81093c15fe874593bdaedd448d6d7a67cb233fb6.name: Astra "Oh, I get it! I struggle with what songs to pick too!"

07ce6ea483a5af95477d57dddb7273f90c6e8e48.name: Hugo "How about placing a little bit?"

d0de2f39df50fa2a1f253c05a84496cb5eedcaf2.name: Hugo "Picking the right actors and audience is also important."

8bb68f9ad467e4a7c34c0b22abb1ea52ecf0e36b.name: Hugo "It's as if I were never here."

4ae9c8992f7ee2c1ea1f564e8e1cab21d196e960.name: Hugo "Shhh! Be sure not to leave any traces."

65f5569fe9fe7a1fda1e14402e0554716ed70ae2.name: Hugo "Such a fiery twist of fate."

b905dc09b5c05ab9814ea3baf581cd2b027463cc.name: Trigger "No valid targets. Initiating backup plan."

6bbccf9587217b7f0b695728e8613ca918f8dd8d.name: Trigger "A great chance to press the attack."

cc1018783d1494e91f8364a850faa946781896e3.name: Trigger "My bullets will bring the answer."

32f2d5bf54a96fbf83e6c2e7176a1044874a79a6.name: Trigger "the right time to hold fire."

27386ac8e9441b17d8b69d2a4884153a1f1b9bc8.name: Billy "Oh my piggy bank just got pork chopped!"

d3fbd82ab33343a128f65f91e75436da750a468a.name: Billy "How about some manga? Can I toss them in?"
